faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help

faq1.question: Can I change plans at any time?
faq1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time from the admin panel. Changes apply immediately and you only pay the prorated difference.

faq2.question: What is RBAC and why do I need it?
faq2.answer: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) is an access control system that assigns permissions based on roles. It's essential for protecting sensitive data, complying with regulations (GDPR, SOC2), and managing teams scalably.

faq3.question: Is data encrypted?
faq3.answer: Yes, all data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Sensitive data like passwords and credentials have an additional layer of application-level encryption.

faq4.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
faq4.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time without penalty. You'll have full access until the end of your current billing period. Your data remains available for 30 days after cancellation.

faq5.question: Do you offer a trial period?
faq5.answer: The Free plan is free forever and doesn't require a credit card. For paid plans, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee with no questions asked.

faq6.question: What support is included?
faq6.answer: The Free plan includes complete documentation and community. Starter includes email support (24h response). Professional includes priority support (4h response). Enterprise includes dedicated 24/7 support with guaranteed SLA.
